OIML Conference2012October 3, 2012

🇷🇴 Bucharest, Romania

14th OIML Conference — Resolutions (EN)

Meeting DOI10.63493/meetings/conf14
Meeting URNurn:oiml:conference:meeting:conference-14

Agenda

ItemTitleOutcome
aBucharest, RomaniaDiscussed
bOpening speechesDiscussed
cRoll callDiscussed
dElection of the Conference President and Vice-PresidentsDiscussed
1Approval of the minutes of the 13th ConferenceAdopted
2Report on the work of the CIML (2009-2012)Discussed
2.1Report by the CIML PresidentDiscussed
2.2The use of French and EnglishDiscussed
2.3Dissolution of the position of “Facilitator on developing country matters”Discussed
3Report on the work of the BIML (2009-2012)Discussed
3.1Organization, management and staff of the BIMLDiscussed
3.2Liaisons with other organizationsDiscussed
3.3Technical work and management of OIML systemsDiscussed
4Report on the 2009-2012 financial periodDiscussed
4.1Developments during the reporting periodDiscussed
4.2Revision of OIML B 8:2004 “OIML Financial regulations”Discussed
4.3SurplusesDiscussed
5Approval of the accounts for 2008, 2009, 2010 and 2011Adopted
6Sanctioning of OIML RecommendationsDiscussed
7Strategy of the OIML - Sanctioning of OIML B 15:2011Discussed
8Member States' contributory classes and the contributory share for 2013-2016Discussed
9Budget for the 2013-2016 financial periodDiscussed
9.1Member State contributionDiscussed
9.2Corresponding Member feeDiscussed
9.3Tariffs for services provided by the OIMLDiscussed
9.4Proposed budget for the 2013-2016 financial periodDiscussed
10Examination of the situation of Member States in arrearsDiscussed
11Interpretation of the OIML ConventionDiscussed
12Date and venue of the next ConferenceDiscussed

OIML

International Organization of Legal Metrology

Legal metrology — the practice and science of measurement that affects trade, health, safety, and the environment.
